name: Almond Cranberry Tart
recipeIngredient: 1 cup toasted slivered almonds, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine 3/4 cup sugar, toasted slivered almonds, and flour. Cut in the butter until crumbly.
2. Beat egg and vanilla; add to flour mixture and stir until moistened. Cover and chill for 30 minutes.
3. Coat fingers with flour and press mixture into the bottom and up the sides of a greased 9-inch springform pan.
4. Bake at 350 degrees for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown. Cool.
5. Meanwhile, soften gelatin in water; set aside.
6. In a saucepan, cook cranberries, jelly, and remaining sugar over medium-low heat until berries pop. Remove from the heat; stir in gelatin until dissolved.
7. Cool; pour into crust. Chill at least 4 hours.
8. Garnish with whipped cream and chopped almonds if desired. Yield: 8-10 servings.
